answer_markdown: Cal Poly Pomona accepts **fall admission** applications from **October 1 through December 15**. Applicants must meet CSU eligibility requirements including completion of the A-G course pattern and minimum GPA thresholds.

citations.title: Freshmen Admissions Requirements
citations.snippet: Cal Poly Pomona accepts applications for fall admission from October 1 through December 15. Applicants must meet CSU eligibility requirements.

citations.title: CSU Admissions Eligibility
citations.snippet: Eligibility is determined by completion of the A-G subject requirements, a qualifying eligibility index, and ACT/SAT scores (if applicable).

answer_markdown: Yes, Cal Poly Pomona is **test-optional** for the 2026-2027 admission cycle. You do not need to submit SAT or ACT scores, though doing so may strengthen your application.

citations.snippet: Cal Poly Pomona is test-optional for the current admission cycle. Submitting SAT/ACT scores is not required.

_description: Response with markdown formatting (headers, lists, bold)
answer_markdown:
## Computer Science at CPP

The **Computer Science B.S.** program at Cal Poly Pomona emphasizes hands-on learning. Key highlights:

- **Units required:** 180 quarter units
- **Core areas:** algorithms, data structures, operating systems, software engineering
- **Senior project:** required capstone project
- **Learn-by-doing:** extensive lab-based coursework

For more information visit the [CS department page](https://www.cpp.edu/sci/computer-science/index.shtml).

citations.title: Computer Science B.S. Program
citations.snippet: The Computer Science program at Cal Poly Pomona emphasizes hands-on learning through lab courses and senior projects. Students complete 180 quarter units.

_description: Financial aid answer with multiple sources
answer_markdown:
CPP offers several types of financial aid:

1. **Grants** (Cal Grant, Pell Grant)
2. **Scholarships** (merit-based and need-based)
3. **Loans** (Federal Direct Loans)
4. **Work-Study** programs

You must file the **FAFSA** or **CA Dream Act Application** annually by **March 2** for priority consideration.

citations.title: Financial Aid and Scholarships
citations.snippet: CPP offers grants, scholarships, loans, and work-study programs. Students must file the FAFSA or CA Dream Act Application annually.

citations.title: Financial Aid Deadlines
citations.snippet: Priority filing deadline for the FAFSA is March 2. Late applications are accepted but may result in reduced aid availability.
